title: PRAGMA integrity_check does not terminate on table with generated column
poc: CREATE TABLE t0 (c0, c1 NOT NULL GENERATED ALWAYS AS (c0 = 0));
key_bug_features: PRAGMA integrity_check hangs on generated column table
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL, check_value BOOLEAN GENERATED ALWAYS AS (value IS NOT NULL));
CREATE TABLE t2 (a INTEGER, b INTEGER NOT NULL GENERATED ALWAYS AS (a + 1));
